name: Sun
headline: The Sun represents the centre
description: Identity, will and what gives you direction. It speaks of what you seek to become, and of how you want to feel fully yourself.

name: Moon
headline: The Moon represents the inner world
description: Emotions, needs and emotional security. It describes how you react spontaneously and what soothes you when you feel vulnerable.

name: Mercury
headline: Mercury represents thought & language
description: The way of understanding, analysing and communicating. It shows how ideas circulate and how you make sense of what you observe.

name: Venus
headline: Venus represents bonds & values
description: What attracts, what pleases and what creates harmony. It speaks of love, attachments and the way you enter into relationships.

name: Mars
headline: Mars represents drive & assertion
description: The energy of action, desire and the ability to assert oneself. It shows how you take action and how you defend your territory.

name: Jupiter
headline: Jupiter represents expansion & meaning
description: Learning, growth and the bigger picture. It indicates where you seek to understand, explore and give meaning to your path.

name: Saturn
headline: Saturn represents structure & time
description: Limits, responsibilities and patient construction. It shows how experience and effort allow us to grow solid.

name: Uranus
headline: Uranus represents change & freedom
description: Rupture, independence and awakening. It indicates where the need arises to break out of frameworks to recover authenticity.

name: Neptune
headline: Neptune represents the ideal & sensitivity
description: Inspiration, imagination and compassion. It also speaks of the blurred zones where discernment becomes necessary.

name: Pluto
headline: Pluto represents deep transformation
description: Crises, questioning and regeneration. It shows what must be gone through to allow an inner renewal.
